label: Webhook Response
description: Send a response back to the webhook caller. Sets the HTTP status code, headers, and body for the inbound webhook that triggered this workflow.

settings.name: statusCode
settings.label: Status Code
settings.description: HTTP status code to return to the caller.

settings.name: bodyTemplate
settings.label: Body Template
settings.description: Response body. Supports {{template}} variables. If omitted, the upstream input is used as-is.

settings.name: headers
settings.label: Headers
settings.description: JSON object of response headers. Values support {{template}} variables.

settings.name: persistAsArtifact
settings.label: Save as artifact
settings.description: When true, write the rendered body to the Artifacts library so it appears alongside chat-produced artifacts. Off by default for backward compatibility.

settings.name: artifactTitle
settings.label: Artifact title
settings.description: Title shown in the Artifacts library. Supports {{template}} variables. Defaults to 'Workflow output — <executionId>' when omitted. Ignored unless 'Save as artifact' is enabled.

settings.name: artifactDescription
settings.label: Artifact description
settings.description: Optional one-line description shown beneath the title. Supports {{template}} variables.

settings.name: artifactTags
settings.label: Artifact tags
settings.description: Array of tag strings (e.g. ['aiops', 'k8s']). Defaults to ['flow-output']. The 'kind' is appended automatically.

settings.name: artifactKind
settings.label: Artifact kind
settings.description: Logical kind (e.g. 'html_report', 'json_report'). Added to the tag list so the Artifacts UI can filter by kind.

ai.shortDescription: Return an HTTP response to the inbound webhook caller.
ai.whenToUse: When a workflow was triggered by an inbound webhook and you need to send a structured HTTP response back to the caller.
ai.examplePrompt: send a 200 response with { success: true } to the webhook caller
ai.promptHints: Only meaningful in webhook-triggered workflows. Use {{steps.X.field}} to include upstream data in the response body.
